raw.message: I just wanted to try it

hook.summary: A hand taps a decorative egg in a nest to hatch it.
hook.visual_action: A hand interacts with a pink and green egg, causing it to crack and reveal a bird.

scene_flow: A hand taps a pink and green egg sitting in a floral nest.
The egg cracks open to reveal a small pink bird wearing a flower crown.
The bird fully emerges, chirps, and confetti falls around it.
Final screen displays seasonal event text and a 'play Now' call-to-action button.
on_screen_text: Don't Miss Out On the New Season
audience_proxy: Casual female players who enjoy pet collection and nurturing games.
